name: Stockland Limited
description: Stockland Limited is a prominent, diversified Australian property development and management company. As one of the country's largest community creators, the firm specializes in the development, ownership, and management of a wide-ranging portfolio, including residential masterplanned communities, land lease communities, retail shopping centres, logistics facilities, and workplace assets. With a focus on creating vibrant, connected environments, Stockland is committed to delivering sustainable urban living and high-quality commercial spaces that meet the evolving needs of Australians while maintaining a strong emphasis on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles across its national operations.
